headline: Target Expands Wellness Offerings And Houston Hub To Support Growth
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) is expanding its wellness and specialty assortment with nationwide launches of Barker Wellness Mushroom Adaptogen Gummies, Pure Genius Protein shots with Mel Robbins, Cypress Grove goat cheeses, Make Time Wellness products for women, TruHeight Vitamins, and gut health offerings from NBPure. The company has opened a 1.2 million square foot supply chain facility in Houston to support real time inventory management and distribution for its growing health oriented and specialty...
